candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Measure the build velocity floor before trusting any approach or team configuration.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Without a clear build approach and quality gate, development velocity cannot be reliably measured or improved.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Template factory with impact-effort prioritization, minimal viable quality, solo founder shipping daily.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Template-based building with daily shipping cadence is the fastest path for solo founders targeting MVP.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Agent workflow with revenue-impact prioritization, production grade quality, founder plus AI weekly releases.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: AI-augmented agent workflows produce production-grade output faster than manual development when prioritized by revenue impact.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Custom development with security-first prioritization, enterprise quality, small team on biweekly sprints.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Enterprise-ready custom development requires small teams with security-first discipline and biweekly review cycles.

candidate_trials.candidate_summary: Low-code with user-request prioritization, minimal viable quality, contractor-augmented team on weekly releases.
candidate_trials.hypothesis: Low-code platforms with contractor augmentation can ship user-requested features faster than custom development at MVP stage.
